title: Give Me My XP
description: Datapack/mod adding new ways to earn experience points. Gain XP from: Harvest crops, mining (toggleable), crafting and more...
body:
# Give Me My XP – Expand Your XP Sources!
Give Me My XP is a Minecraft datapack that enhances the game by adding new ways to earn experience points, making the game progression more rewarding and dynamic. No more need for building ugly mob farms - with this pack you can gain XP from farming crops, exploring, crafting, mining, chopping trees, and more! Some XP sources, such as mining and tree chopping, can be toggled **On** or **Off** using simple commands. There is also a fun little challenge where if players complete multiple trades with villagers in less than a minute, they will be rewarded with additional experience...

Additionally, killing the Warden now grants a more deserving reward, making it truly feel like the **REAL** boss battle.

## Features:
- Gain XP from farming crops, crafting, exploring, mining, tree chopping, and shield blocking.
- Configurable XP gain rate: ***Half XP***, ***Normal XP***, or ***Double XP***.
- New XP reward for defeating the Warden!
- Admin-friendly customization with trigger commands.
- Multiplayer-compatible and fully server-friendly.
- Toggle XP from mining and tree chopping on/off with an easy command.
- Compatible with simple harvest (right click harvest) feature from [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) mod.
- Trading minigame.
## Admin Commands:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  _An admin is a player with the **is_admin** tag, automatically given to the **first** player who joins the world. In singleplayer, you'll have full access to /trigger commands._
 
**Toggling XP from mining and tree chopping (admin only):**
-    Enable XP from mining blocks and tree chopping: ```/trigger blockXP set 1```
-    Disable XP from mining and tree chopping: ```/trigger blockXP set 2```

**Selecting XP gain rate (admin only):** 
- Half XP gain: ```/trigger selectXP set 1```
- Normal XP gain: ```/trigger selectXP set 2```
- Double XP gain: ```/trigger selectXP set 3```

**XP Sound Configuration (for all players):**
- Enable XP sound when earning XP: ```/trigger sound_config set 1```
- Disable XP sound when earning XP: ```/trigger sound_config set 2```
</details>

## How does it work?
**This datapack utilizes Minecraft scoreboards to track player progression and reward XP based on the selected XP gain rate. For example, when a player mines 50 stone, they will receive:**
- **5 XP** on **Half XP** mode
- **10 XP** on **Normal XP** mode
- **20 XP** on **Double XP** mode

When harvesting crops, the datapack modifies loot tables, giving fully grown crops a chance to drop XP orbs in addition to their regular yield. For crops that don’t have growth stages, such as sugarcane or mushrooms, the datapack uses the **scoreboard** system to track harvesting.
## Supported crops:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Beetroots, Wheat, Potatoes, Carrots, Nether Wart
- Red Mushroom, Brown Mushroom
- Pumpkins, Melons
- Cocoa, Glow Berries, Sweet Berries
- Grass, Fern, Dead Bush
- Sugarcane, Cactus   

</details>



### Installation Instructions: (datapack)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Download the datapack file.
- Open your Minecraft world save folder:

- ```C:\Users\<YourUsername>\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\<YourWorldName>\datapacks```
- Copy the downloaded datapack file into the datapacks folder.
- Start your Minecraft world and use ```/reload``` to load the datapack.

</details>
